query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `meeting_agenda_items` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `meetingId` INT NOT NULL,
  `title` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  `description` TEXT,
  `presenter` VARCHAR(255),
  `duration` INT DEFAULT 10,
  `orderIndex` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `itemType` ENUM('discussion', 'vote', 'information', 'action_item', 'add_on') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'discussion',
  `isAddOn` BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  `addedById` INT,
  `addedByName` VARCHAR(255),
  `requiresVote` BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  `voteStatus` ENUM('pending', 'in_progress', 'completed', 'deferred', 'cancelled') DEFAULT 'pending',
  `voteProposalId` INT,
  `votesFor` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `votesAgainst` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `votesAbstain` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `voteResult` ENUM('approved', 'rejected', 'tie', 'deferred', 'pending') DEFAULT 'pending',
  `voteStartedAt` TIMESTAMP NULL,
  `voteEndedAt` TIMESTAMP NULL,
  `discussionNotes` TEXT,
  `status` ENUM('pending', 'in_progress', 'completed', 'skipped') DEFAULT 'pending',
  `createdAt` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

  `voteStatus` ENUM('pending', 'in_progress', 'completed', 'deferred', 'cancelled') DEFAULT 'pending',

  `votesFor` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,

  `voteStartedAt` TIMESTAMP NULL,
  `voteEndedAt` TIMESTAMP NULL,
  `discussionNotes` TEXT,
  `status` ENUM('pending', 'in_progress', 'completed', 'skipped') DEFAULT 'pending',

  `updatedAt` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
